name: RARE ELEMENT RESOURCES LTD
summary: Rare Element Resources Ltd. is focused on advancing the Bear Lodge rare earth elements (REE) project in Wyoming, which includes a mineral deposit and a planned commercial processing and separation plant. The company is operating a demonstration-scale REE processing and separation plant funded in part by the U.S. Department of Energy. It also holds a 100% interest in the Sundance Gold Project, currently on hold since 2011.

products.name: Bear Lodge REE Project
products.description: Rare earth elements mining, processing and separation project located near Sundance, Wyoming, including a planned commercial-scale plant.

products.name: Demonstration Plant
products.description: Demonstration-scale rare earth elements processing and separation plant used to validate proprietary technology for potential commercial-scale production.

products.name: Sundance Gold Project
products.description: Gold mineralization project adjacent to Bear Lodge REE Project, on hold since 2011, containing historical inferred mineral resource across three gold targets.

partnerships.description: Synchron, an affiliate of General Atomics, is the Company's majority shareholder; General Atomics serves as prime contractor under the DoE Cost Share Agreement for the Demonstration Plant.
Funding partner providing financial support for the Demonstration Plant project through a Cost Share Agreement.
Provided a grant for the Demonstration Plant project; remaining uncollected funds referenced in the filing.
